svg.text: Node.js · Fastify · PostgreSQL · Redis · BullMQ · Sharp · FFmpeg · S3/MinIO
Private bucket · upload target · download source for workers
Plain CDN URLs for HLS/DASH manifests
presigned URL or CDN URL → media stream / download
Upload Flow ① Client → API validates + MIME probe ② API streams original to S3 ③ DB write (asset + metadata) ④ Enqueue BullMQ job → return 201 {id}
Processing Flow ⑤ Worker dequeues job ⑥ Downloads original from S3 ⑦ Transcodes/processes → uploads variants/manifests/thumbnails to S3 ⑧ Updates DB status
Query & Delivery Flow ⑩ Client polls GET /v1/media/:id/status until ready ⑪ API returns delivery URLs → Client fetches directly from CDN or presigned S3 URL
Image: 5 concurrent jobs · 15 variants per asset (5 sizes × WebP/AVIF/JPEG) · Max 100 MB / 8K px
Video: 2 concurrent jobs · ≤5 renditions + HLS + DASH + thumbnails + audio · Max 5 GB / 2 h
Retry: 3 attempts · exponential backoff (5 s base) · Dead-letter on exhaustion · Admin reprocess available
State: pending → queued → processing → ready / failed / dead
Security: Argon2id · JWT · timingSafeEqual admin key · IDOR 404 · CWE-209/532 · Helmet · rate-limit
Infra: PostgreSQL 16 · Redis 7 (BullMQ + rate-limit store) · MinIO/S3 (two buckets: originals + variants)
HLS/DASH: always served via plain CDN URL (presigned URLs break relative segment resolution in players)
